case_title: MAURICIO VERA LOPEZ VS. CVP HOLDINGS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, MAURICIO VERA AS TO DEFENDANT CVP HOLDINGS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA MECCA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
